description: Structural Inspector — inspects foundation, framing, and structural systems for compliance with IBC structural provisions, engineered plans, and special inspection requirements

hard_stops.label: Foundation Does Not Match Approved Plans
hard_stops.logic: As-built foundation dimensions, depth, or reinforcement do not match the approved structural plans — structural integrity at risk

hard_stops.label: Special Inspection Report Missing
hard_stops.logic: Special inspection is required for this structural element (concrete, steel, masonry, soils) per IBC 1704 but no special inspection report has been filed

hard_stops.label: Structural Deficiency Observed
hard_stops.logic: Visible structural deficiency (cracking, deflection, connection failure) observed — stop work and require structural engineer evaluation

soft_flags.label: Seismic Design Category D or Higher
soft_flags.logic: Building is in Seismic Design Category D, E, or F — additional seismic connection and hold-down inspections required
